recommendation: Serilog is the best choice for structured logging in .NET. It offers rich sink support, structured event data, and excellent integration with ASP.NET Core via the Serilog.AspNetCore package.

alternatives.name: NLog
alternatives.comparison: Similar feature set but less community adoption. Better XML configuration support.

alternatives.name: Microsoft.Extensions.Logging
alternatives.comparison: Built-in but less powerful. Good for simple scenarios, Serilog wraps it for advanced use.

compatibility: Compatible with .NET 6, 7, and 8. Full support for minimal APIs and top-level statements.
versionAdvice: Latest stable: 3.1.1. No breaking changes from 3.0. Recommended to use with Serilog.AspNetCore 8.0.0+ for .NET 8 projects.
nextStepSuggestion: Generate integration code to set up Serilog in your project.
nextStepDescription: Now that you've chosen Serilog, the Code Generator can create the configuration, sink setup, and middleware integration code for your ASP.NET Core project.
